c : Imo2010P3.PosInt

m n : Imo2010P3.PosInt
⊢ (m + c + n) * (n + c + m) = (m + n + c) * (m + n + c)

proof:
simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf

      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> norm_num at *
      <;> linarith

```lean
```lean
theorem imo2010_p3 (g : ℤ>0 → ℤ>0) :
    g ∈ SolutionSet ↔ ∀ m n, IsSquare ((g m + n) * (g n + m)) := by
  constructor
  · rintro (rfl | ⟨c, hc⟩) m n
    · -- Case g = id
      use m + n
      <;> simp_all [id]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;> nlinarith
    · -- Case g(x) = x + c
      use m + n + c
      <;> simp_all [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;> nlinarith

theorem imo2010_p3 (g : ℤ>0 → ℤ>0) :
    g ∈ SolutionSet ↔ ∀ m n, IsSquare ((g m + n) * (g n + m)) := by
  constructor
  · rintro (rfl | ⟨c, hc⟩) m n
    · -- Case g = id
      use (m + n : ℤ)
      <;> simp [id]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;> nlinarith
    · -- Case g(x) = x + c

      <;> simp [hc]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      <;> nlinarith
